news.title: Chutes & Ladders—AC Immune CEO bids adieu
news.snippet: Andrea Pfeifer, Ph.D., the longtime leader of Swiss neurodegeneration outfit AC Immune, is retiring from the C-suite to spend more time with her family. Pfeifer will be replaced in the interim by boar

news.title: Signant Health buys Ametris to unite data streams in clinical trials
news.snippet: Tech provider Signant Health announced the acquisition of Ametris to unite its electronic clinical outcome assessments with Ametris’ wearable-derived digital outcome measures.

news.title: Biopharma leaders rally behind Pazdur for FDA commissioner pick. But does he want the role?
news.snippet: With the FDA now rudderless following the revelation that commissioner Marty Makary, M.D., is stepping down, voices across biopharma have joined in support of the FDA’s former top drug regulator Richa

news.title: BioAge CEO has big plans for 'multi-disease impact' of NLRP3 drug across cardio, ocular and CNS
news.snippet: After axing its lead obesity asset last year, BioAge Labs has turned its attention to attacking inflammation in its pursuit of treatments for aging-related illnesses.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker '26: Create corrals $122M; Isomorphic's $2B series B
news.snippet: The Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker records venture capital rounds of $50 million or more secured by biotechs.

news.title: Create Medicines fashions $122M fundraise for in vivo CAR-T dreams
news.snippet: As the wave of in vivo CAR-T hype crests, Create Medicines is catching the swell with a $122 million series B meant to back its early pipeline of autoimmune and cancer candidates.

news.title: Biogen advances Alzheimer’s tau program despite midphase miss
news.snippet: A phase 2 trial of Biogen and Ionis Pharmaceuticals’ tau-targeting candidate missed its primary endpoint. But while the Alzheimer’s disease trial failed to yield the hoped-for dose-response data, redu

news.title: Fierce Biotech Layoff Tracker 2026: Takeda takes away 4.5K roles; Valneva reduces workforce
news.snippet: As always, if you know of layoffs occurring at a biotech, please reach out to the Fierce Biotech editorial team.

news.title: Regenxbio reaps pivotal win for Duchenne muscular dystrophy gene therapy
news.snippet: Regenxbio’s gene therapy for Duchenne muscular dystrophy has smashed the primary endpoint of its pivotal trial, securing a win for a biotech that has struggled in recent months under the weight of a r

news.title: Aptose, facing cash crunch, exits blood cancer pact after Hanmi buyout blocks development
news.snippet: Aptose Biosciences has scrapped a deal for a blood cancer drug candidate as part of its pending takeover by Hanmi Pharmaceutical.

news.title: Icon opens early-phase research unit in San Antonio, plus satellite clinics to grow trial capabilities
news.snippet: Global contract research organization Icon has announced the opening of a new research facility in San Antonio, Texas, along with satellite clinics in Houston and Lawrence, Kansas, to expand its clini

news.title: With $1B Novo deal and diabetes ambitions undimmed, Lexicon is in ‘good shape to go crazy’
news.snippet: Lexicon CEO Michael Exton told Fierce how he set the company's development and financial pathway "on a very different trajectory."

news.title: Fosun pays $60M for option on AriBio’s phase 3 Alzheimer’s asset
news.snippet: Fosun Pharma has paid $60 million for an option on AriBio’s late-phase Alzheimer’s disease program, securing the chance to expand its rights to the asset in exchange for a further $80 million.

news.title: Valneva to lay off up to 15% of workforce in face of ‘adverse trend’ in travel vaccines
news.snippet: Valneva is planning to shrink its headcount by up to 15% as the French vaccine developer continues to seek ways to cut costs.

news.title: Humacyte cuts spending, staff as it seeks to boost sluggish sales for its off-the-shelf artery implant
news.snippet: Humacyte was riding high in December 2024 when it secured an FDA green light for a groundbreaking implant. Now, as it looks to boost sales of the device, it’s making sweeping cuts to keep up.

news.title: Johnson & Johnson bladder cancer survey reveals toll of surgery, BCG treatment
news.snippet: A new survey undertaken by the Harris Poll for Johnson & Johnson has shown how standard forms of surgery and treatment for certain bladder cancer patients are causing a major long-term emotional i

news.title: AstraZeneca scores with Imfinzi in another bladder cancer trial, rivaling Merck's Keytruda
news.snippet: Following an FDA approval in muscle-invasive bladder cancer patients who are eligible to receive cisplatin-based chemotherapy, AstraZeneca on Thursday reported positive phase 3 results for its Imfinzi

news.title: Eli Lilly delivers $50M boost to UNICEF’s pediatric health push
news.snippet: Eli Lilly has made a six-year, $50 million commitment to UNICEF USA to support efforts to improve the prevention, detection and management of noncommunicable diseases.

news.title: Biopharma leaders rally behind Pazdur for FDA commissioner pick. But does he want the role?
news.snippet: With the FDA now rudderless following the revelation that commissioner Marty Makary, M.D., is stepping down, voices across biopharma have joined in support of the FDA’s former top drug regulator Richa

news.title: Regulatory tracker: Taiho's Inqovi widens its reach with FDA label expansion
news.snippet: In this tracker, Fierce Pharma is recording the regulatory progress of in-market products, including expansions into key geographies and new indications. Some of these updates may not meet the bar for

news.title: FDA floats possible approach to repurpose approved drugs under new uses
news.snippet: The framework would leverage existing safety data on approved drugs to provide new options to patients with unmet medical needs, the FDA explained.

news.title: Sun recalls US chemotherapy batch, citing glass particle contamination concerns
news.snippet: Generics juggernaut Sun Pharma is pulling one lot of a chemotherapy drug in the United States as the issue of particulate contamination crops up once again on the FDA’s recall register.

news.title: Bora snaps up MacroGenics’ manufacturing, CDMO operations for up to $127.5M
news.snippet: Taiwan’s Bora Group will shell out up to $127.5 million to acquire the CDMO business and manufacturing operations from Maryland-based MacroGenics.

news.title: Patient involvement in life-shortening conditions: MND Insights
news.snippet: Meaningful involvement in MND research ensures patient perspectives shape progress, making science relevant and compassionate.

news.title: BeOne's Venclexta challenger Beqalzi nets FDA approval as first BCL-2 for mantle cell lymphoma
news.snippet: BeOne Medicines has entered the BCL-2 arena, securing an FDA green light for Beqalzi that carves out a unique piece of territory ahead of a potential broader clash with market leader Venclexta.

news.title: As Trump arrives in China, Big Pharma CEOs are notably absent
news.snippet: As President Trump lands in Beijing, one major industry is missing from his business delegation—pharma.

news.title: Merck KGaA looks to M&A to bolster its 'rather slim' pipeline
news.snippet: Under new CEO Kai Beckmann, Merck KGaA is emphasizing M&A to stock its early- to mid-stage pharma pipeline, the company said in reporting its first quarter results.

news.title: Takeda, slimming down for 'new era,' plots 4,500 layoffs in latest restructuring drive
news.snippet: Takeda's multiyear slim-down is expected to hit about 4,500 roles during the 2026 fiscal year, resulting in about 170 billion Japanese yen ($1.07 billion) in restructuring costs and some 100 billion y

news.title: Novo, Lilly tout respective early response and weight loss maintenance data as GLP-1 rivalry intensifies
news.snippet: Eli Lilly and Novo Nordisk are building cases for their incretin drugs, both new and old, as attractive weight loss maintenance options and a potentially speedier option to shed pounds, respectively.

news.title: BeOne Medicines’ Brukinsa TV ad 'Clarity' hit by FDA over 'misleading suggestions'
news.snippet: The FDA has issued an untitled letter to BeOne Medicines’ U.S. subsidiary over a TV commercial promoting its BTK blood cancer drug Brukinsa, saying the ad used “compelling and attention-grabbing visua

news.title: PSA screening for prostate cancer reduces disease-specific deaths, new review shows
news.snippet: Prostate-specific antigen (PSA) blood testing likely reduces the risk of death from prostate cancer, found a new review

news.title: Supreme Court preserves access to widely used abortion pill, while lawsuit plays out
news.snippet: The Supreme Court on Thursday preserved women’s access to the abortion drug mifepristone, rejecting lower-court restrictions while a lawsuit continues.

news.title: Makary’s departure and Cassidy’s tenuous Senate seat
news.snippet: This week's episode of “The Readout LOUD” is all about health politics, including Marty Makary's departure as FDA commissioner. Listen now.

news.title: STAT investigates the epidemic killing 178,000 Americans a year
news.snippet: Read Executive Editor Rick Berke's letter to STAT readers on "The Deadliest Drug," a new investigative series into the country's failure to address excessive alcohol use.

news.title: STAT+: The hunt for FDA’s next leader
news.snippet: Marty Makary is out, and the Trump administration has a long wish list for its next FDA commissioner.

news.title: STAT+: BeOne wins FDA approval in lymphoma race
news.snippet: Diamantas takes the reins, Regenxbio stakes claim in Duchenne gene therapy, and more biotech news from The Readout

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about upbeat results for a Duchenne drug, Takeda layoffs, and much more
news.snippet: Biogen reported mixed results from a mid-stage clinical trial investigating a treatment for Alzheimer’s disease that targets the protein tau

news.title: STAT+: Three years of declining overdose deaths begets cautious optimism and some concerns
news.snippet: The next FDA leader, how the CDC is responding to hantavirus, and more health news from Morning Rounds

news.title: STAT+: Biogen’s tau-targeting Alzheimer’s drug posts mixed results in mid-stage study
news.snippet: Biogen is moving its tau-targeting Alzheimer's drug into Phase 3 studies, despite mixed data from a Phase 2 trial.

news.title: STAT+: Regenxbio says Duchenne gene therapy succeeded in clinical trial, paving way for FDA submission
news.snippet: Regenxbio said its experimental gene therapy for Duchenne muscular dystrophy succeeded in a trial, paving the way for a submission to the FDA.

news.title: STAT+: CREATE Medicines, a biotech company developing CAR-T therapies, raises $122 million
news.snippet: CREATE Medicines has a new name, an expanded pipeline, and now fresh funding to propel the company’s first CAR-T candidates through human trials.

news.title: STAT+: ‘No drama’ Diamantas should serve biotech well as acting FDA chief
news.snippet: Kyle Diamantas, the acting commissioner of the FDA, is expected to be a drama-free, stabilizing caretaker at the top of the agency.

news.title: MPs call for sunbed advertising ban to help prevent skin cancer
news.snippet: A report by a cross-party group of MPs has found the majority of skin cancer cases are preventable.

news.title: Daily pill to help keep weight off after stopping obesity jabs
news.snippet: The tablet - orforglipron - is available in the US and could soon launch in the UK.
